prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-HOTWHEELS-TOWN-GKT869574-HPNR
Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET
Brand (from catalog): Hot Wheels
Existing Title: Hot Wheels City Town Center Play Set Gift Idea for Ages 4 to 8 Years, Multicolor
Description: Kids can drive their Hot Wheels cars and experience Hot Wheels City through iconic and recognizable city locations. There are multiple ways to play with the Hot Wheels Central City Block, starting with the main building that has 2 different sides with access from each. Kids can fix their cars in the mechanic area then test them in the roundabout. Remind them to pay attention to the traffic lights. They can drive in and out from the building, pass through the tunnel and store cars in secret places. The exclusive track pieces let kids create a new path every time. When it's time to stop kids can just drop everything in the building: the roundabout will be the top of it, sealing their special pieces for the next adventure. Each set connects directly to other Hot Wheels City sets and with Hot Wheels City grey track, still compatible with orange track, too.
Search Terms: cars vehicles diecast town set box carrying case creativity learning education development imagination autos race playset modular
Features:
- Designed to inspire storytelling and creativity for kids ages 4 to 8 years old with fresh, colorful and functional sets they will love.
- Drive in and out of buildings, car repair, tunnel, roundabout, traffic lights and secret storage spots. Create a new path every time!
- Finished playing Store everything into the building and seal with the lid for next time
- Everything connects in Hot Wheels City and other Hot Wheels tracks and play sets (sold separately). Ages 3-6 years old.
- Kids can go on adventures in multiple locations with this set that resembles a city block with 2 sides.

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Hot Wheels City Town Center Play Set for Ages 4-8

openai.item_name: Hot Wheels Multicolor City Town Center Play Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Sided Building, Mechanic Shop, Roundabout, Tunnel, Traffic Lights, Secret Storage, Modular Connections

openai.title_differentiation: Two-Sided City Block, Car Repair Garage, Tunnel, Roundabout, Traffic Lights, Secret Storage, Connects To Tracks
